sentences.text: James this is Alex with our check calling from rentable. I'll be connected in the past about actually about a year ago, and was hoping to maybe get some time on your calendar early next week to touch base talk a little bit about our growth over at rentable couple of partners out your way that is currently signed on with us and and see maybe if it made sense to give us a a test run over there with sir Valley management give me a call back or feel free to respond to the email. I'll shoot you a quick note here after this phone call and hopefully we can get something on the books here soon thanks. So much James look forward to hearing back.

Thank you for calling sir Valley real estate and property management. Please listen carefully before making a selection. If you know your party's extension you can dial it at any time for emergency. Please enter four four office directory, please enter five for a dial by. Using the keys on your touch tone phone. Please enter the name of the party you wish to reach last name first press Star at anytime to return to the main menu. To reach Christopher Riley press one to reach James sir Valley press to to reach transferring to James sir Valley. James, sir, Valley is not available to take your call. Please leave a message after the tone press the pound key to end recording.
